title: phlegmariurus hystrix
intro: Phlegmariurus hystrix, also known as the spiny forked polypody, is a species of epiphytic fern that belongs to the lycopodiopsida class. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Phlegmariurus hystrix include treating various health conditions, such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, as well as being used as an antiseptic and anti-inflammatory agent. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant is often used as a decoction or infusion, where it is combined with other herbs to create a medicinal tea or applied topically as a paste to treat specific health issues.
